notes: The public mirror is generated from a private source-of-truth checkout after local validation, not by pushing or mirroring private git history.

The first public mirror is a deployment mirror for GHCR containers, public setup docs, and public metadata. Application source stays in the private source-of-truth repository until a separate source-publication boundary is designed.
The allowlist defines the first export contract. A path must be intentionally allowed before it can appear in a generated public tree.
The denylist wins over the allowlist.
